reasoning: The explosion VFX (bright yellow-white fireball with warm orange tones) is immediately spottable against the mid-gray brick tile background — locatability well under 0.5s. The silhouette reads as a distinct burst shape, not confused with the boss character or UI elements. The pixel-art style is broadly consistent with the Echoes aesthetic, though the explosion's slightly smoother rendering versus the chunky boss sprite creates a minor native-vs-pasted tension. Overall clean, bright, uncluttered — fits Echoes feel well.
